description: Harden LanceDB as the local-first vector retrieval runtime, add explicit reopen and corruption handling, document the supported retrieval lifecycle, and record backend comparison thresholds.
oracle_notes: Track 60 turns the LanceDB runtime from a working default into a documented and benchmarked retrieval surface. It must keep Python fallback behavior stable, preserve the optional Qdrant boundary, and remain compatible with the current GitHub issue mirror.
